final_prompt.prompt:
Create a full-screen brand exposure marketing poster designed as a smartphone screenshot for OPPO Find X9 Pro, prioritizing visual impact.

Style/medium: high-impact flat digital advertising, bold graphic design in the spirit of premium smartphone launch campaigns
Composition: full-bleed vertical layout (9:16), centered hero product with generous breathing room, strong visual hierarchy from top brand name to bottom CTA zone
Subject: OPPO Find X9 Pro smartphone as hero product, sleek and modern industrial design, prominent camera module detail
Scene/backdrop: deep black or ultra-dark gradient background to maximize contrast and premium feel
Lighting/mood: dramatic single-source rim lighting on the device, cool blue-white accent glow, high-contrast and commanding
Color palette: deep black as dominant base, OPPO brand red as accent, cold silver/white highlight on device edges
Text (verbatim): "OPPO Find X9 Pro"
Constraints: must read as a realistic phone screenshot UI frame; brand name must be legible at full-screen scale; layout must feel like an official OEM launch ad
Avoid: cluttered backgrounds, warm or soft lighting, generic stock-photo aesthetic, watermarks, lorem ipsum placeholder text
